texts.label: text
texts.orig: This is for information of all concerned  students that Post-Matric  and other  Scholarship  schemes  of various categories  are open/will be opening soon for applying online/offline  through  following scholarship portals  for the year 2020-21.
texts.text: This is for information of all concerned  students that Post-Matric  and other  Scholarship  schemes  of various categories  are open/will be opening soon for applying online/offline  through  following scholarship portals  for the year 2020-21.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The students  who are eligible for any of the above scholarship schemes are instructed  to APPLY or RENEW online in the respective  portals  within stipulated  time and submit self attested  copies ofthe necessary documents  to Sri Amar Debnath,  Lecturer & INO for institute level verification.  For any other relevant information  and assistance,  students  may also approach him.
texts.text: The students  who are eligible for any of the above scholarship schemes are instructed  to APPLY or RENEW online in the respective  portals  within stipulated  time and submit self attested  copies ofthe necessary documents  to Sri Amar Debnath,  Lecturer & INO for institute level verification.  For any other relevant information  and assistance,  students  may also approach him.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: N.B: The Income Certificate  should be submitted in original and must be obtained from concerned  SDM offices  onlv.
texts.text: N.B: The Income Certificate  should be submitted in original and must be obtained from concerned  SDM offices  onlv.
